name: Cash - Operating Checking
description: Primary operating account. All shop-management-system settlements, parts purchases, and payroll outflows.

name: Cash - Reserve Savings
description: Operating reserve account.

name: Merchant Settlements Receivable
description: Card sales settled by the shop POS provider but not yet deposited.

name: Accounts Receivable
description: Invoiced amounts owed by fleet and commercial customers.

name: Inventory - Parts (Resale)
description: Parts purchased for installation in customer vehicles and resold at marked-up price. Inventory asset until installed.

name: Inventory - Fluids & Consumables
description: Bulk fluids (oil, coolant, transmission fluid, brake fluid) and consumables held for use across jobs.

name: Inventory - Tires (Resale)
description: Tire inventory awaiting installation.

name: Prepaid Insurance
description: Annual policies (garage keepers, general liability) paid up-front and amortized monthly.

name: Equipment - Lifts
description: Capitalized vehicle lifts in both service bays.

name: Equipment - Diagnostic Tools
description: Capitalized diagnostic scanners, alignment machine, OBD-II equipment.

name: Equipment - Specialty Tools (Capitalized)
description: Specialty tools over the $500 capitalization threshold: hydraulic presses, large torque wrenches, brake-lathe.

name: Accounts Payable - NAPA
description: Outstanding parts-account balance with NAPA, paid monthly on terms.

name: Accounts Payable - Other
description: Vendor balances outside of the NAPA parts account.

name: Payroll Liabilities
description: Withheld employee taxes pending Gusto remittance.

name: Credit Card Payable
description: Outstanding business credit card balance, paid monthly.

name: Owner's Contributed Capital
description: Cash and equipment contributed at formation.

name: Retained Earnings
description: Accumulated profits not yet distributed.

name: Owner Distributions
description: S-corp owner distributions.

name: Sales - Labor
description: Hourly labor rate billed on repair-order tickets.

name: Sales - Parts Markup
description: Markup on parts billed to customers; calculated as billed price less cost basis (which flows through COGS).

name: Sales - State Inspections
description: NH state safety and OBD-II inspections, flat fee per vehicle.

name: Sales - Tire Markup
description: Markup on tire sales, separately itemized given different margin structure.

name: COGS - Parts (Resold)
description: Cost basis of parts installed in customer vehicles. Recognized at install, not at purchase.

name: COGS - Tires (Resold)
description: Cost basis of tires installed.

name: COGS - Towing Subcontracted
description: Tow-operator subcontract cost when towing is on-billed to a customer.

name: Rent - Shop
description: Monthly rent on the shop building and lot.

name: Utilities - Electric
description: Monthly electric utility.

name: Utilities - Gas & Water
description: Heating gas and water/sewer combined.

name: Wages - Technicians
description: Hourly wages for the two technicians.

name: Wages - Owner
description: S-corp reasonable-comp salary for the owner.

name: Payroll Taxes
description: Employer share of payroll taxes.

name: Payroll Service Fees
description: Monthly Gusto subscription and per-employee fees.

name: Workers Compensation Insurance
description: Quarterly workers' comp premiums.

name: General Liability Insurance
description: Annual general-liability policy.

name: Garage Keepers Insurance
description: Coverage for customer vehicles in the shop's care, custody, and control. Required for the trade.

name: Merchant Processing Fees
description: Card-processing fees.

name: Bank Service Charges
description: Bank account and wire fees.

name: Shop Supplies
description: Shop-floor consumables: shop rags, oil-absorbent, gloves, brake-cleaner spray, threadlocker. Distinct from office supplies.

name: Office Supplies
description: Office-side consumables: paper, pens, printer ink, receipt rolls. Distinct from shop supplies.

name: Small Tools (Expensed)
description: Hand tools and specialty tools under the $500 capitalization threshold.

name: Repairs & Maintenance - Facility & Equipment
description: Service calls and parts for shop building and capitalized equipment.

name: Waste Disposal
description: Used-oil pickup, used-coolant pickup, scrap-metal removal, tire-disposal fees.

name: EPA Compliance & Hazmat Fees
description: EPA-mandated fees, hazmat handling fees, state environmental fees.

name: Software Subscriptions
description: Shop-management system (Mitchell1, AllData), parts-lookup, accounting, scheduling.

name: Marketing & Advertising
description: Local newspaper ads, Google Local Service ads, sponsorship of community events.

name: Uniforms & Laundry Service
description: Weekly uniform-and-shop-towel laundry service.

name: Professional Services - Accounting
description: Bookkeeper monthly fee, annual tax preparation.

name: Permits, Licenses & Inspection Fees
description: Business license, NH inspection-station license, weights-and-measures, BAR certifications.

name: Continuing Education & Certifications
description: ASE certification renewals, technician training, hybrid-and-EV training.

name: Telephone & Internet
description: Business phone and shop internet.
